since_last: 54% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.10%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.01% · BTC +0.36% · Gold +1.06% · Nasdaq100 +0.39%. 54% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.10%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.10%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: VRT is the standout at +7.43%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.43%, SMR +7.28%, AMAT +7.21%, ARM +6.78%, OKLO +6.60%. Laggards: APP -4.45%, AI -4.25%, SNAP -3.97%, META -3.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.05% at $195.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
